objective: Expose the canonical SDKMessage type from the remote SDK message adapter for SSH session stubs that import through that adapter boundary.
changes: Added a type-only re-export of SDKMessage from src/entrypoints/agentSdkTypes.js in src/remote/sdkMessageAdapter.ts.

verification.notes: The SSHSessionManager TS2459 diagnostic for SDKMessage no longer appears in the tsc log.
